nav.aria: メインナビゲーション

hero.eyebrow: Devnet コントラクト目録
hero.title: NiceChunk のオンチェーンプログラム、ID、統合境界。
hero.subtitle: 現在の NiceChunk Solana プログラムを、プレイヤーと開発者向けに公開するページです。各コントラクトが保存する内容、フロントエンドが呼ぶ処理、現在の devnet 範囲外の機能を明確にします。
hero.networkNote: これらは開発とフロントエンド統合用のコントラクトであり、mainnet の最終状態を示すものではありません。

directory.title: 現在の NiceChunk プログラム。
directory.body: リポジトリに存在し、devnet 統合で使われるコントラクトを一覧化します。

flow.title: 現在のゲームプレイがチェーンに触れる流れ。

steps.title: Genesis 設定を読む
steps.body: The client derives GlobalConfig from the core program and reads world seed, chunk size, build limits, NCK mint, and published config hashes.

steps.title: プレイヤープロフィール作成
steps.body: The player program stores wallet-owned profile data, default attributes, position, equipment slots, and backpack style.

steps.title: 採掘セッション開始
steps.body: A player can create a short-lived session authority so repeated mining actions do not require wallet confirmation every block.

steps.title: 破壊ブロックを記録
steps.body: The chunk program verifies the generated single block, then writes a compact 3-byte broken-block record into the chunk-broken PDA.

steps.title: リソースを追加
steps.body: The backpack program is prepared to append mined resource records after session validation. It is the inventory-side bridge for the mining loop.

details.title: コード、instructions、PDA seeds、保存データ。

developer.title: フロントエンドとスクリプト統合の参照。
developer.boundaryBody: このページは devnet の現行コントラクト面を文書化します。mainnet ガバナンス、市場決済、土地所有、完全なゲーム分散化が完成したという主張ではありません。
developer.pdaCode:
GlobalConfig: ["global-config"]
PlayerProfile: ["player", owner]
PlayerSession: ["session", owner, sessionAuthority]
ChunkState: ["chunk", globalConfig, chunkX:i32_le, chunkZ:i32_le]
ChunkBrokenState: ["chunk-broken", globalConfig, chunkX:i32_le, chunkZ:i32_le]
GuardianRegistry: ["guardian-registry", globalConfig]
GuardianRegion: ["guardian-region", globalConfig, regionX:i32_le, regionY:i32_le]
GuardianTreasuryAuthority: ["guardian-treasury", globalConfig]
Backpack: ["backpack", creator, backpackId:u64_le]

programs.name: NiceChunk Genesis Core
programs.role: Immutable world configuration and NCK mint validation.
programs.summary: The core program initializes the GlobalConfig PDA once. It writes compiled genesis parameters such as world seed, world ID, config hashes, NCK mint, NCK decimals, genesis supply, fees, chunk limits, and guardian parameters. It does not mint items, manage inventory, update admin settings, or run gameplay logic.
instructions: Validates SPL Token mint layout, decimals, initialized flag, genesis supply, disabled mint authority, and disabled freeze authority.
Creates or allocates the GlobalConfig PDA safely even if the PDA was pre-funded with dust lamports.
storage: World ID and 32-byte world seed.
Terrain, resource rule, and client world config hashes.
NCK mint, decimals, genesis supply, and development wallet.
Chunk size, section height, build limits, max terrain height, sea level, cooldowns, and guardian settings.
notes: This is the immutable genesis config layer for the current devnet build.
Future crafting, inventory, chunk state, world knowledge, and reputation systems belong in separate programs or future modules after PDA specs are finalized.
Devnet and testnet must use their own NCK mint; the mainnet mint should not be reused on development clusters.

programs.name: NiceChunk Player
programs.role: Wallet-owned player profile, position, equipment slots, backpack style, and mining session authority.
programs.summary: The player program creates a wallet-bound profile and a short-lived session authority. The session lets the game submit repeated allowed actions, such as block breaking, without opening the wallet for every single mined block.
storage: Owner wallet, GlobalConfig address, world ID, bump, and timestamps.
Base attributes: health, energy, stamina, mining power, build power, and defense.
Current position and nine equipment slots.
Session authority, allowed action bitmask, expiration time, max actions, and action count.
notes: The profile is public state. Private backpack contents should be loaded separately when the player opens inventory flows.
The current session model is used to reduce repeated wallet prompts during mining.
Sessions are bounded by expiration, allowed action flags, and max action count.

programs.name: NiceChunk Chunk
programs.role: Verifies generated single blocks and records compact broken-block state per chunk.
programs.accountSize: ChunkState: 8,280 bytes; ChunkBrokenState: 16-byte header + 3 bytes per record
programs.summary: The chunk program supports legacy chunk delta accounts and the current optimized mining path. For mining, the player submits one world block coordinate. The program derives the chunk, verifies the generated block, rejects air/water/bedrock or already-mined positions, and appends a compressed broken-block record.
storage: Legacy ChunkState stores up to 128 64-byte block deltas.
ChunkBrokenState stores a 16-byte header and 3-byte mined-block records.
A record packs local x, local z, and y offset. Capacity starts at 64, grows by 64, and caps at 2,048 records.
GlobalConfig world seed, chunk size, build height, max terrain height, and sea level are used for generated block verification.
notes: This is the current mining write path used by the browser client.
MagicBlock delegation hooks exist in the codebase, but the current gameplay path does not require MagicBlock.
Backpack resource settlement is intentionally separate so mining state and inventory state can evolve independently.

programs.name: NiceChunk Guardian Registry
programs.role: Registers Guardian regions, endpoints, NCK treasury payment, liveness proof, settlement, and endpoint updates.
programs.summary: The guardian program records public service endpoints for regional realtime infrastructure. A guardian registers a region, pays the NCK registration amount to the treasury token account, and periodically submits proofs. The registry is non-custodial and does not sign player transactions.
storage: Registry stores GlobalConfig, NCK mint, treasury token account, active count, and genesis flag.
Region stores status, region coordinates, owner/operator wallet, endpoint host, port, TLS flag, stake amount, slash total, proof count, and timestamps.
Region size is 100 by 100 chunks. Registration requires a 100,000 NCK treasury payment at 6 decimals.
Proof interval is 3,600 seconds. Settlement can slash 10% per missed proof window until removal.
notes: The current web Guardian page reads this registry and region PDA data from devnet.
Endpoint updates are limited to the guardian owner/operator flow.
The registration payment goes to the treasury token account; this registry does not provide user-initiated unstaking or withdrawal.

programs.name: NiceChunk Backpack
programs.role: Creates player backpack accounts and appends mined resource records after player/session validation.
programs.summary: The backpack program is the inventory-side bridge for mined resources. It creates a compact backpack PDA for a player and appends 10-byte resource records when a valid player session authorizes the write.
storage: Backpack header stores backpack ID, owner, capacity, item count, state, timestamps, and flags.
Default capacity is 36 records. Max capacity is 99 records.
Each mined resource record is 10 bytes.
Append validates the player profile owner and the break-block session action.
notes: Backpack contents are separate from public player profile display.
This program is prepared for the mining-to-inventory flow and can be expanded later without changing chunk broken-state records.
It does not implement marketplace settlement, equipment forging, or item governance.
